---
description: Create the initial folder structure for the Hypernode Astro project
---

Create the following empty directories by adding a `.gitkeep` file to each.
Do not create any other files and do not modify any existing files.

Directories:
- src/components/ui/primitives/
- src/components/ui/blocks/
- src/components/pages-view/changelog/
- src/components/pages-view/homepage/
- src/components/pages-view/pricing/
- src/content/pages/
- src/layouts/footer/
- src/lib/
- src/types/
- src/assets/images/
- strapi/

Each `.gitkeep` must be completely empty (no content, no comments).
